subject: Rebase PR #13 (agent-8/EventLog) onto updated main and verify build
description:
REQUEST_ID: merge-all-open-prs
DOMAIN: trade
ASSIGNED_TO: worker-3
FILES: src/components/trade/EventLog.jsx, src/components/trade/EventLogSettings.jsx
VALIDATION: tier2
TIER: 3
PRIORITY: URGENT

## Task: Rebase agent-8 branch (PR #13) onto main

PR #13 adds the EventLog component (trade domain). Main has moved forward. Rebase agent-8 onto current main.

NOTE: There is no wt-8 worktree. You (worker-3) are handling this rebase in your worktree (wt-3) because agent-8 has no dedicated worktree.

## Steps

```bash
# 1. Fetch and checkout agent-8 branch in your worktree
git fetch origin
# Save current branch for reference
CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current)
# Checkout agent-8
git checkout agent-8 2>/dev/null || git checkout -b agent-8 origin/agent-8

# 2. Rebase onto main
git rebase origin/main
```

## If Conflicts Arise

**IMPORTANT about --ours/--theirs during rebase:**
During `git rebase`, the naming is REVERSED:
- `--ours` = main (the base you're rebasing onto)
- `--theirs` = your commits being replayed

Conflict resolution rules:
- `src/components/trade/EventLog.jsx` or `EventLogSettings.jsx`: KEEP YOUR version
  `git checkout --theirs <file>`
- Any other trade files: KEEP MAIN's version (trade-hooks-migration handled those)
  `git checkout --ours <file>`
- `src/components/scanners/` files: KEEP MAIN's version
  `git checkout --ours <file>`
- `dist/` files: REMOVE THEM
  `git rm -rf dist/ 2>/dev/null || true`
- `.claude/` files: KEEP MAIN's version
  `git checkout --ours .claude/`
- `docs/specs/` files: KEEP YOUR version if you have them
  `git checkout --theirs docs/`

After resolving: `git add <file>` then `git rebase --continue`

## After Rebase

```bash
# Force push rebased agent-8 branch
git push --force-with-lease origin agent-8

# Build verification
npm install && npm run build

# Return to your normal branch
git checkout $CURRENT_BRANCH 2>/dev/null || git checkout -b agent-3
```

If build fails, fix the issue before continuing.

## Completion

1. Update worker-status.json: status = 'completed_task', current_task = null
2. Append to change-summaries.md: note PR #13 (agent-8) rebased and ready
3. Touch .claude/signals/.completion-signal
